# Vendored browser dependencies

`supabase-2.108.2.js` is the official UMD browser bundle from
`@supabase/supabase-js@2.108.2`. It is pinned and self-hosted so the protected
pages do not depend on an unversioned CDN script.

SHA-256:
`C123F7E874934778B7D89FEE7DCE8DE26C858A2C3A92FD7A3F870394A6A2F91F`

When upgrading, download the exact npm package, replace the bundle, update the
versioned filename and this checksum, then rerun the browser smoke suite.
